name: journal-merge-union
title: Journal merge=union + index.md conflict guidance
description: Fix #415 (quick-fix tier): .gitattributes merge=union for append-only journal-*.md so parallel-worktree/task archive merges don't conflict on journal content; document that index.md conflicts are expected (full-rewrite file, pick either side) and are not a bug; warn when running inside a git worktree with session_auto_commit enabled. Structural fix (per-session files, index.md as derived non-git cache) stays a separate follow-up task.
creator: taosu
